mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cms.daily_logs (ymd, title, value, color) VALUES (#{ymd}, #{title}, #{value}, #{color})
mapper.update: UPDATE cms.daily_logs SET ymd = #{ymd}, title = #{title}, value = #{value}, color = #{color}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, ymd, title, value, color, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM cms.daily_logs WHERE ymd BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} ORDER BY ymd, id
SELECT DISTINCT ON (title) title, value, color FROM cms.daily_logs ORDER BY title, id ASC
